prompts.proposer:
Call proposer_brief() FIRST. The tool output includes pattern_analyst_insights — use trend_champion, seasonality_champion, and insights.recommended_method_hint to bias your candidate selection toward non-mean methods. MUST propose at least 3 candidates including at least 1 non-baseline type. Return ONLY JSON per instructions. IMPORTANT: you MUST ONLY reference candidate names that appear in the tool output candidate_library; unknown names will hard-stop.
PATTERN ANALYST INSIGHTS: trend_champion='DWT_catboost', seasonality_champion='ONLY_CWT_catboost', recommended_method='dba_combination'. Narrative: Analysis reveals high model disagreement (rmse_spread_ratio=0.6582) and significant seasonality variance (0.4714), with DWT_catboost leading trend tracking and ONLY_CWT_catboost capturing seasonality best. The true series consistently trends upward across all folds, but models disagree substantially on how to capture this pattern and seasonal cycles. Given both high disagreement and seasonality variance, DBA combination is recommended to leverage complementary strengths while mitigating individual model weaknesses.

You may only remove/override candidates that are in current_candidate_names (or candidates you are adding).

raw.pattern_analyst:
{
  "trend_champion": "DWT_catboost",
  "seasonality_champion": "ONLY_CWT_catboost",
  "overall_champion": "catboost",
  "horizon_specialists": {"early": "ONLY_FT_rf", "late": "rf"},
  "tier1_models": ["catboost", "NaiveMovingAverage", "ONLY_FT_rf", "ETS", "ONLY_FT_svr", "THETA", "rf", "DWT_catboost"],
  "tier2_models": ["ONLY_DWT_rf", "ONLY_FT_catboost", "svr", "ARIMA", "CWT_rf", "ONLY_DWT_catboost", "FT_catboost", "FT_svr"],
  "recommended_method_hint": "dba_combination",
  "recommended_weighting_basis": "mixed",
  "key_insights": {
    "rmse_spread_ratio": 0.6582,
    "high_disagreement": true,
    "high_seasonality_variance": true,
    "ytrue_trend_directions": ["up", "up", "up"]
  },
  "cot_narrative": "Analysis reveals high model disagreement (rmse_spread_ratio=0.6582) and significant seasonality variance (0.4714), with DWT_catboost leading trend tracking and ONLY_CWT_catboost capturing seasonality best. The true series consistently trends upward across all folds, but models disagree substantially on how to capture this pattern and seasonal cycles. Given both high disagreement and seasonality variance, DBA combination is recommended to leverage complementary strengths while mitigating individual model weaknesses."
}
raw.proposer:
{
  "selected_names": ["dba_combination", "best_per_horizon_by_validation", "inverse_rmse_weights_k5_sh0.35", "topk_mean_per_horizon_k5", "robust_median"],
  "params_overrides": {},
  "score_preset": "rmse_focus",
  "force_debate": false,
  "debate_margin": 0.02,
  "rationale": "n_unique_winners=10 indicates strong per-horizon selection value. relative_spread_mean=0.664 (≥0.25) signals high model disagreement requiring robust methods like dba_combination and robust_median. Pattern analyst recommends dba_combination for high seasonality variance (0.4714). RMSE spread between catboost (21.08) and ONLY_CWT_svr (35.54) is significant, favoring weighted approaches with shrinkage. Score preset rmse_focus aligns with tool recommendation due to high model dispersion."
}

pattern_analyst.cot_narrative: Analysis reveals high model disagreement (rmse_spread_ratio=0.6582) and significant seasonality variance (0.4714), with DWT_catboost leading trend tracking and ONLY_CWT_catboost capturing seasonality best. The true series consistently trends upward across all folds, but models disagree substantially on how to capture this pattern and seasonal cycles. Given both high disagreement and seasonality variance, DBA combination is recommended to leverage complementary strengths while mitigating individual model weaknesses.

proposer.rationale: n_unique_winners=10 indicates strong per-horizon selection value. relative_spread_mean=0.664 (≥0.25) signals high model disagreement requiring robust methods like dba_combination and robust_median. Pattern analyst recommends dba_combination for high seasonality variance (0.4714). RMSE spread between catboost (21.08) and ONLY_CWT_svr (35.54) is significant, favoring weighted approaches with shrinkage. Score preset rmse_focus aligns with tool recommendation due to high model dispersion.
